corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/container page from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York providing links to agency MBS operations data, SOMA holdings, transaction data, and related resources. No substantive content, data, or analysis is contained in this page body itself.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: This page describes the institutional structure of Fed MBS operations but provides no substantive data, analysis, or actionable insights. It is an index page only. Actual research should source data from the linked Agency MBS Operations, SOMA Holdings, or Transaction Data resources.
